title: primula villosa subsp. villosa
intro: Primula villosa subsp. villosa, also known as the American cowslip or wild cowslip, is a flowering plant species native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Primula villosa subsp. villosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
